title: elatostema leiocarpum
intro: Elatostema leiocarpum, commonly known as the Chinese watercress or water wisteria, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elatostema leiocarpum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Elatostema leiocarpum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and it is also used in traditional cooking in some Asian cultures.
